items.title: Enhance Email Audience Filtering in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update restricts audience previews and freezes to configured test recipients when real-recipient delivery is disabled. It normalizes test addresses and ensures the audience remains empty if no test recipients are configured. A regression test has been added to confirm that real users are excluded from the frozen snapshot in seed mode.

items.title: Enhance Email Marketing Deployment Stability in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the deployment structure for the email marketing API, ensuring it receives the correct secret. It also mounts the email configuration across all relevant components and implements fail-fast behavior for missing keys. Additionally, regression tests have been added to validate the changes and ensure stability.

items.title: Enhance Memory Actions with Solid Buttons in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces solid primary and danger buttons for Memory actions, improving the visual hierarchy and usability. The 'Import' button is now a solid primary action, while 'Clear all' and 'Forget' are styled as solid danger actions with red backgrounds. Additionally, the buttons are designed to prevent shrinking and ensure proper wrapping in narrow layouts.

items.title: Launch Email Marketing Admin Console in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Email Marketing entry in the admin navigation, featuring six dedicated workspaces: overview, campaigns, audiences, subscriptions/suppressions, Tencent settings, and delivery events. Additionally, it includes user email preferences and typed API operators, enhancing user control and experience. Comprehensive validation has been performed, ensuring a clean build and robust functionality.

items.title: Enhance UTM Source Select Behavior in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update remounts the creatable UTM source select when direct changes are included, ensuring that the Element Plus internal state is cleared when 'direct' is removed. The existing summary request behavior is preserved, enhancing the user experience. Validation checks have passed, confirming the integrity of the changes.

items.title: Enhance phone login for passwordless accounts in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes issues with phone login for social accounts that had null or unusable passwords, preventing crashes. It now returns a generic 401 password_incorrect response for both email and phone passwordless accounts, along with added regression tests to cover legacy scenarios.

items.title: Enhance CI for Email Marketing Tests in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates `pytest-django` into the CI environment, allowing the email marketing test suite to run fully during PR checks. PostgreSQL 15 services are now consistently utilized across both PR and deploy workflows, ensuring matching credentials. Additionally, linting has been added for the email marketing tests to maintain code quality.

items.title: Sync Verification Complete for Docs in Clis 🚀
items.summary: The recent sync check for the `veo` CLI confirmed that all documentation updates did not require any changes to the OpenAPI specification. A thorough comparison showed that all models, aspect ratios, resolutions, actions, and endpoints are in perfect alignment. With 58 tests passing and no lint errors, everything is functioning smoothly.

items.title: Enhance Data Protection for Memory Imports in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces blocking mechanisms for sensitive health and personal data during bulk memory imports. Key changes include the normalization of Unicode and separators to effectively identify obfuscated terms in both English and Chinese. The implementation has passed all memory tests, ensuring robust data protection without affecting regular chat memory functionalities.

items.title: Launch Enhanced Email Campaign Delivery in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a robust operational delivery plane for email campaigns, featuring a single-replica PostgreSQL queue worker with advanced consent and suppression checks. Key enhancements include the reconciliation of ambiguous provider outcomes and the refreshing of audience profiles while ensuring compliance with data privacy standards. The deployment also includes comprehensive documentation and validation, ensuring a smooth rollout and operational integrity.

items.title: Enhance direct marketing filter synchronization in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update improves the handling of the direct marketing filter by consuming the Element Plus switch change payload directly. It ensures that the `includeDirect` state is synchronized and clears any invalid selected `direct` source when the switch is turned off, while maintaining existing marketing dashboard behaviors. All validations, including ESLint and production builds, have passed successfully.

items.title: Launch Email Marketing Campaign Foundation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the foundational elements for registered-user email marketing campaigns in PlatformBackend. Key features include consent modeling, audience profiles, and a DB-backed global kill switch, along with superuser APIs for managing campaigns and preferences. The rollout is designed to ensure stability and privacy, with thorough validation completed across multiple tests.

items.title: Streamlined AI and Data Service Policies in Germey Tech 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the Checkout, Contact, Terms, Privacy, and Refunds sections with a unified AI Solutions and Data Services model. Key changes include clarified pricing structures, customer rights, and processing terms, ensuring consistency across all customer-facing documentation. Additionally, all routes and layouts have been validated and legacy wording removed for a cleaner user experience.

items.title: Revamp Veo Action Configuration for Better UX in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the Veo action configuration by replacing the dropdown with compact tabs for Text, Image, and Ingredients. The model selector is now constrained to the current Veo contract, and reference uploads are made action-aware, improving the user experience significantly. Additionally, localization updates ensure that all changes are reflected across multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance Memory Imports with Asynchronous Polling in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces asynchronous polling for long memory imports, improving the user experience by preventing timeouts and duplicate submissions. Key changes include the implementation of idempotency UUIDs for imports, enhanced error handling, and localized messages for in-progress imports. The frontend timeout has been aligned with backend settings to ensure smoother operations.

items.title: Streamlined Focus on AI Solutions and Data Services in Germey Tech 🚀
items.summary: This update refines the Germey Tech website by concentrating on two primary service lines: AI Solutions and Data Services. Key changes include a simplified homepage and checkout process, aligning legal copy, and removing the physical address. All routes and layouts have been validated for both desktop and mobile views.

items.title: Enhance Memory Imports with Asynchronous Processing in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces asynchronous processing for long memory imports, addressing previous issues with timeouts. Key changes include immediate response with a task ID, background processing of imports, and improved job management to prevent orphaned tasks. The implementation has been validated with extensive tests, ensuring stability and performance enhancements.

items.title: Enhance Pairing Identity Display in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces the display of key fingerprint, platform, packaged extension version, and fixed extension origin during the claim confirmation process. It ensures that these details are only visible while a claim is pending and hides them afterward to protect sensitive information. Comprehensive tests confirm the functionality and security of the new features.

items.title: Enhance marketing filters and revenue display in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update improves the marketing channel filters by replacing freeform UTM inputs with searchable selects, while still allowing custom entries. Additionally, general-balance revenue is now displayed as 'General/通用' instead of '-', enhancing clarity. The changes ensure a smoother user experience and maintain optional backend response fields for safe deployment.

items.title: Revamped Germey Tech for AI Consulting Services in Germey Tech 🚀
items.summary: This update repositions Germey Technology to focus on AI technology consulting, software integration, data workflow engineering, and automation implementation. Key changes include the removal of outdated service descriptions and the alignment of the homepage, checkout, and other pages to reflect new professional service offerings. Validation checks confirm that all public routes are functioning correctly and the site is optimized for both desktop and mobile views.

items.title: Enhance Nexior branding with site-specific overrides in Index 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces the ability for site administrators to customize the name and icon of Nexior capability apps directly from the Settings menu. A new `SiteCapabilityOverride` entity has been implemented to manage these overrides, ensuring a seamless user experience without additional requests. The changes also include comprehensive validation and a clean review process, confirming the robustness of the new features.

items.title: Update pairing version handling in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the hardcoded pairing version and injects the actual version from the extension manifest into the pairing service. The AuthBackend now correctly receives the packaged version during challenge requests, ensuring better version management. All tests have passed successfully, confirming the integrity of the changes.

items.title: Enhance Marketing Attribution Filters in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces normalized UTM source, medium, and campaign filter options to the fast marketing analytics response. The options are derived during the signup metadata scan without additional database queries, ensuring performance is maintained. Each list is capped at the 100 most frequent values, enhancing the clarity and usability of marketing data.

items.title: Say Goodbye to AI ID Photo Feature in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The unused AI ID Photo feature has been permanently removed from Nexior, including all associated components, pages, and localization files. A total of 115 files were changed, resulting in approximately 5,818 lines of code removed. This cleanup enhances the overall performance and maintainability of the application.

items.title: Enhance Xiaohongshu Skill for Improved User Control in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous cloud tab discovery instructions with a user-controlled 'Attach current tab' flow, ensuring a more intuitive experience. It also removes unsupported claims regarding account attestation and maintains the Skill in a read-only state until local approval is obtained. Additionally, contract tests have been strengthened to reflect these changes, ensuring better reliability and compliance.

items.title: Enhance Pricing Tier Selection Behavior in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update prevents the automatic rotation of the service pricing package selector and the models directory top-up tier. The largest package is now selected by default while allowing for manual selection, improving user experience and clarity in pricing options.

items.title: Veo CLI is perfectly in sync with the latest Docs! 🎉 in Clis 🎉
items.summary: The recent updates to the Docs have been reviewed, and it turns out the Veo CLI is already aligned with the latest OpenAPI specifications. No changes were necessary as all modifications were limited to guide MDX files, and the CLI matches the spec exactly. This ensures a seamless experience for users without any additional updates required.

items.title: Restoring Veo Pricing to Pre-July Levels in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update restores the pricing for the current supported Veo generation models to their pre-July-11 rates, significantly reducing costs for users. Key changes include adjustments to the API billing and service display pricing, as well as updates to public documentation to reflect the new pricing structure. All relevant tests have passed, ensuring stability and accuracy in the pricing model.

items.title: Enhance Memory Imports with LLM Extraction in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces regex parsing with LLM semantic extraction for various data formats, improving the handling of imported memories. It introduces stricter validation for pasted exports and maintains existing sanitization and deduplication processes. The changes ensure a more reliable and secure memory import experience while capping LLM output to prevent excessive data accumulation.

items.title: Enforce Seedance Duration Validation in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update implements strict validation for Seedance duration requests, rejecting any requests with frames and ensuring that invalid numeric durations are not processed. Successful requests will now be billed based on the valid realized duration while maintaining an auditable requested duration. The changes enhance the reliability of the billing process and prevent undercharging.

items.title: Fix marketing dashboard card resizing issues in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the percentage min-height from marketing analysis cards, preventing standalone table cards from depending on the auto-height page wrapper. Additionally, it places the Chart.js canvas in a fixed-height parent to comply with responsive sizing requirements, effectively stopping the ResizeObserver feedback loop that caused card height issues. The changes stabilize card heights and enhance overall performance.

items.title: Enhance Proxy for Browser Capability JWKS in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a specific nginx proxy location for the browser capability JWKS endpoint in the AuthFrontend configuration. Previously, valid Relay calls were failing due to the SPA fallback returning the index.html instead of the required JWKS file. The change ensures successful validation and improves the overall functionality of the production browser extension.

items.title: Enhance fetch handling in extension service worker in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an 'Illegal invocation' error by binding the native fetch function correctly within the extension service worker. Key changes include invoking `globalThis.fetch(...)` through lexical wrappers for improved pairing and session refresh. The modifications have been validated with a full extension audit, resulting in all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Reverted Bill Seek Seedance Changes in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the recent changes made to the Bill Seek Seedance functionality. Key modifications include the removal of validation checks for duration and frames, which were previously introduced. The impact of this revert aims to restore the previous behavior of the video handling process.

items.title: Enhance Seedance Billing with Realized Duration in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update implements support for the Seedance 2.0 `duration: -1` auto mode in the Seek worker, ensuring accurate billing based on realized duration. Key changes include validating the `frames = 25 + 4n` request option and preserving original requested duration and frames in billing metadata. The implementation also includes safeguards against charging when realized duration is omitted or invalid.

items.title: Update Veo Router Command for Correct Upstream Port in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the `--upstream-port 8080` flag to the TSE create-service command for the Veo router in the documentation. This change ensures that the service correctly targets the Kubernetes service port 8080, resolving issues encountered during live rollout. Validation confirms that the command formatting is correct and that the service now has two targets on the appropriate port.

items.title: Enhance Capabilities with Omni and AI ID Photo Icons in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Omni capability to the settings list and replaces the generic AI ID Photo avatar with a dedicated favicon. Localized labels and summaries for Omni have been added across 18 languages, ensuring a consistent user experience. Additionally, regression tests have been implemented to verify the new features.

items.title: Enhance Relay Bootstrap Handling in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update allows the BrowserDevice to rebootstrap after the initial pairing expiry by parsing the device-session bootstrap independently. The changes ensure that only the short-lived Relay expiry is validated, improving the robustness of the device-session exchange. All tests and validations have passed successfully.

items.title: Enable paired browser execution in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update activates the authenticated Browser Relay tool routing and aichat2 browser Skill dispatch. Key changes include modifications to deployment configurations for both aichat2 and browser-relay, ensuring that browser execution is enabled in production. The implementation is contingent on the readiness of the AuthBackend, which must be healthy before merging.

items.title: Activate BrowserDevice Bridge for Production in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enables the BrowserDevice pairing and browser_session connector creation in production, along with the ES256 capability grants. Key Kubernetes secrets have been provisioned, and the necessary code paths and migrations have been validated through extensive PostgreSQL testing. This is a crucial step before enabling browser execution in the PlatformService.

items.title: Enhanced Browser Agent Tools for Chrome Extension in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the Browser Agent into the PlatformFrontend Chrome MV3 extension, enhancing its capabilities while maintaining the existing Publisher cookie bridge. Key features include non-extractable device identity, improved session management, and a dedicated CI gate for extension validation. The changes ensure a more secure and efficient user experience while adhering to strict validation protocols.

items.title: Enhance Browser Skills Dispatching in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability to dispatch browser skills through paired devices, enhancing the execution of browser capabilities. Key changes include the addition of new configurations for browser execution, improved filtering of legacy skills, and the introduction of new browser-related tools and tests. The production feature remains disabled by default, ensuring a safe rollout.

items.title: Enhance Browser Tool Execution Routing in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces synchronous dispatch, cancel, and status handling for browser tool execution using Redis for two-replica ownership. The Browser Relay now verifies authentication grants, derives routing identities, and manages tool call envelopes, while also implementing strict result handling and timeout management. Extensive validation has been performed with 40 tests, ensuring robust functionality and readiness for deployment.

items.title: Enhance Browser Execution Capabilities in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces significant enhancements to the browser execution capabilities within the AuthBackend. Key changes include the addition of browser session challenges, improved device pairing, and robust validation mechanisms. The implementation supports short-lived grants and ensures strict verification processes, enhancing security and user experience.

items.title: Streamline BrowserAgent Integration in Index 🚀
items.summary: The standalone BrowserAgent repository has been successfully integrated into the existing PlatformFrontend/extension Chrome extension. This update removes the duplicate top-level submodule and .gitmodules entry, ensuring a single ownership boundary for the extension. Validation checks confirm that BrowserAgent is no longer present in the index and all related commands pass without issues.

items.title: Enhance WeChat Search Navigation in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the WeChat search functionality by allowing users to click on specific rows without triggering web-search actions. It ensures that chat titles match the requested targets before reporting success and introduces a diagnostic tool for search UIA that operates under abnormal conditions. The changes enhance user experience and reliability in search operations.

items.title: Confirmed CLI Alignment with Latest Docs in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update verifies that the `gemini`, `kling`, and `veo` CLIs are fully aligned with the latest OpenAPI specifications. A thorough comparison was conducted, confirming no code changes are necessary as all command surfaces and payload mappings match the current documentation. The sync results show no drift, ensuring consistency across the services.

items.title: Enhance Marketing Dashboard with Daily Insights in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the marketing dashboard by loading core analytics faster and displaying daily active user trends with 31 data points. The update also separates the monthly active user card and introduces a localized Refresh button for on-demand channel details. Additionally, stale requests are invalidated, and the trend title is translated into all supported languages.

items.title: Confirmed sync of gemini, kling, and veo CLIs with latest Docs in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update verifies that the `gemini`, `kling`, and `veo` CLIs are fully aligned with the latest Docs OpenAPI specifications. A thorough comparison showed that no changes were necessary, as the current implementations already match the upstream specs. This PR serves as a confirmation of the existing alignment without requiring any source or test modifications.

items.title: Seamless Memory Import from Other AIs in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a guided memory import flow, allowing users to easily transfer memories from other AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude. Users can copy an export prompt, paste results, and review imported entries immediately, enhancing their experience. Additionally, the update includes localized import strings for 18 languages and various backend improvements.

items.title: Enhance User Analytics with Daily Active Users in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new admin-only endpoint for daily active-user analytics, allowing for detailed tracking of user engagement. The core analytics response remains efficient by providing an option to exclude active users, ensuring backward compatibility. Performance benchmarks show significant improvements in response times for both the new and legacy endpoints.

items.title: Enhance Veo with Ordered Provider Failover in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a task-aware Veo failover-router that enforces a strict provider order of cqtai, mountsea, and ttapi. It preserves synchronous blocking calls while orchestrating asynchronous tasks, and includes comprehensive testing to ensure the correct provider is used under various failure conditions. Additionally, it implements a robust deployment strategy with rollback capabilities, enhancing the reliability of video processing services.

items.title: Enhance Memory Import Functionality in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a Claude-style paste import action to the scoped memories API, allowing for deterministic parsing of memory exports. Key features include sanitization of prompt-injection variants, deduplication of entries, and enforcement of size and line limits. The implementation has passed all memory import tests, ensuring robust functionality.

items.title: Enhance Gemini Videos Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the Gemini Videos integration documentation with live-verified examples. Key changes include the addition of a `POST /gemini/tasks` request and response example, documentation of new response fields like `aspect_ratio` and `prompt`, and clarification on the `video_url` status during processing. Overall, these enhancements provide clearer guidance for users integrating with the omni-flash service.

items.title: Launch Comprehensive Email Marketing System in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a robust email marketing distribution system designed for AceDataCloud. Key features include a centralized admin console, PostgreSQL durable queue, and a detailed development plan with a focus on consent and audience management. The implementation plan outlines necessary steps for rollout, ensuring a reliable and scalable email campaign process.

items.title: Enhance CLI with Motion Mode Fixes and Reference Video URLs in Clis 🎉
items.summary: This update addresses two CLI specification mismatches in the motion command and adds a required option for generating reference video URLs. The `--mode` option now correctly restricts to specified modes, and `--character-orientation` is now mandatory. Additionally, the `generate` command for the wan model has been updated to include the `--reference-video-urls` option, enhancing its functionality.

items.title: Align Video O1 Duration Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update clarifies that the `kling-video-o1` model only accepts a duration of 5 seconds, removing the previously misleading global duration enum. The OpenAPI description has been updated to maintain the specific rules for V3, Video O1, and legacy models. This change enhances the accuracy of the API documentation and prevents confusion for users.

items.title: Revamped Localized Guide Sync in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update restores the synchronization of localized guides by reading from the new document feed and handling mapping conflicts effectively. Key improvements include retry mechanisms for feed errors and explicit warnings for missing localized guides. Additionally, regression tests have been added to ensure the robustness of the synchronization process across multiple languages.

items.title: Retired Veo Operations Documentation Hidden in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update hides deprecated Veo operation APIs and their integration guides, ensuring a cleaner user experience. The Upsample, Extend, Reshoot, and Objects APIs are marked as deprecated and removed from visibility, while maintaining their billing rules for legacy calls. The migration has been validated with successful tests and production checks.

items.title: Revamp Capabilities with Icons and Summaries in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update renames 'Function Settings' to 'Capabilities' across 18 locales and introduces a compact 22px service icon for each of the 31 capabilities. It replaces toggle instructions with concise, localized introductions for each service, enhancing user understanding. Additionally, regression tests have been added to ensure the integrity of icon and description mappings.

items.title: Optimize marketing analytics requests in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the loading sequence for marketing analytics by prioritizing core analytics before the heavier channel-attribution report. It also improves error handling by utilizing an existing localized message key and implements safeguards against stale data through token generation and request invalidation. Overall, these changes aim to streamline performance and reliability in the analytics process.

items.title: Revamp Marketing Analytics for Speedy Insights in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update optimizes marketing analytics by replacing numerous batched ORM queries with parameterized PostgreSQL cohort joins. Key improvements include significant reductions in query times, with the first-event cohort query dropping from ~53 seconds to ~0.194 seconds, enhancing overall performance for analytics endpoints. The changes also ensure accurate attribution and efficient data aggregation for better insights.

items.title: Enhance Seek Balance Monitoring in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new feature to monitor Seek balance by querying the Seek API. It includes handling for various account statuses like 'ok', 'unlimited', and 'error', while also converting remaining quotas to CNY. Additionally, focused tests have been added to ensure robust functionality and validation of the new feature.

items.title: Enhance CLI with grok-4.5 support in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the new `grok-4.5` model to the CLI for both the aichat and grok components, ensuring alignment with the latest OpenAPI specifications. Key modifications include the addition of `grok-4.5` to the model lists and updates to the display labels for clarity. These changes enhance user experience by providing access to the latest model options.

items.title: Enable Grok 4.5 Model Routing in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update allows the OpenAI-compatible worker to accept and advertise the `grok-4.5` model ID. Key validations confirm successful integration, including HTTP responses and testing outcomes. The rollout is currently blocked by a related backend PR, ensuring a smooth transition once dependencies are resolved.

items.title: Launch Grok 4.5 Pricing and Model Metadata in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Grok 4.5 model to the public catalog, complete with official two-tier token pricing. Key changes include adjustments to the pricing structure based on prompt token usage and updates to the OpenAPI enums. The rollout ensures that the model is fully integrated and validated across various services, enhancing the overall functionality and user experience.

items.title: Enhance Loading Feedback for Conversations in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an animated loading indicator and message skeleton while historical conversations are being retrieved. The composer remains anchored and submission is disabled during the restore process to prevent sending stale context. Additionally, the restore state is scoped to the active conversation to enhance user experience during rapid conversation switching.

items.title: Enhance GitHub Proxy for Model Compatibility in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the GitHub proxy by aligning response compatibility with various models, addressing issues with static model lists and endpoint routing. Key changes include dynamic reading of supported endpoints, enhanced error handling, and a robust caching mechanism. The modifications ensure seamless integration and improved performance for responses-only models while maintaining compatibility with existing services.

items.title: Enhance BrowserDevice Management UI in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive owner-facing UI for managing BrowserDevice pairing and secure exact-claim processes. Key features include challenge code handling, real-time expiry management, and the ability to rename or revoke devices. The UI is designed to enhance user experience while maintaining strict security protocols, ensuring that ordinary users cannot access the pairing flow without the appropriate feature flag.

items.title: Transition to Local Browser Execution for Xiaohongshu in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the unlaunched Xiaohongshu cloud runtime with a local browser execution skill. Key changes include the removal of over 7,800 lines of cloud code, implementing strict local account verification, and ensuring that media publishing remains blocked until local upload capabilities are established. The migration is designed to enhance performance and security while maintaining user control.

items.title: Launch Browser Relay Skeleton in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the foundational structure for the authenticated Browser Relay service, enabling outbound-only WebSocket connections for registered browser devices. Key features include P-256/JCS authentication, Redis integration, and a robust security model with strict origin policies. The deployment is validated with successful unit tests and integration checks, paving the way for future enhancements.

items.title: Resolve Migration Conflicts in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a no-op Django merge migration to resolve conflicts between the `0214_restore_veo_extend_api` and `0215_order_finished_at` migrations. It also unblocks the PlatformBackend init container, which was previously failing due to multiple migration leaf nodes. The changes ensure smoother deployment and stability in the backend environment.

items.title: Exciting New Omni Video Module Added in Nexior 🎥
items.summary: We've introduced a brand new standalone Omni video module to Nexior, enabling text-to-video, image-to-video, and video editing capabilities powered by omni-flash. This module follows the established standalone video pattern and integrates seamlessly with the existing gemini services. Key components include a new configuration panel, recent tasks display, and support for multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance BrowserDevice Pairing and Relay Bootstrap in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive BrowserDevice pairing state machine, including P-256 proof and owner confirmation. Key features such as signed resumable completion polling, PostgreSQL-backed public rate limits, and two-phase Relay bootstrap introspection have been added. The changes ensure secure credential handling and allow for schema deployment without immediate feature activation.

items.title: Integrate BrowserAgent as a Submodule in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update registers the `AceDataCloud/BrowserAgent` repository as a top-level submodule in the Index, tracking the main branch. The integration includes a pinned commit for consistency and validation checks have confirmed the integrity of the setup. The `.gitmodules` file has been updated accordingly to reflect this new addition.

items.title: Enhance Task Media Display in Nexior 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces the display of input images, videos, and audio for tasks in Kling, enhancing user experience. It includes support for various media types and improves task rendering by safeguarding against malformed video list data. The changes have been validated with comprehensive testing and linting.

items.title: Revamped TTAPI Pricing and Features in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update restores the `/veo/extend` endpoint to public access and lowers the pricing for Veo generation. The new rates are set at 1.68 credits for fast and 12.00 credits for quality, aligning with TTAPI's native extension support. Additionally, optional fields for aspect ratio and resolution have been added to the OpenAPI documentation.

items.title: Enhance TTAPI with Veo Video Extension Support in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces a new `POST /veo/extend` endpoint to the TTAPI worker, allowing users to extend Veo video tasks while preserving existing contracts. Key improvements include user verification for source tasks, model matching, and aspect ratio inheritance. The rollout plan ensures a smooth transition with minimal disruption to existing services.

items.title: Launch of Read-Only BrowserAgent MVP in Browser Agent 🚀
items.summary: The new read-only MVP for the BrowserAgent has been successfully implemented, featuring a fixed extension ID, managed tab isolation, and strict security measures. Key functionalities include a non-extractable P-256 identity and fail-closed tool calls until authentication capabilities are established. The code has passed extensive validation, including audits and tests, ensuring a robust foundation for future enhancements.

items.title: Revamp Marketing Dashboard for Admins in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update transforms the existing Marketing Attribution page into a comprehensive Marketing Dashboard. Key features include KPI cards for signups and revenue, a conversion funnel, and synchronized date filters. The dashboard is now fully localized across all supported languages, enhancing accessibility for users worldwide.

items.title: Launch Marketing Analytics API in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new admin-only marketing analytics API that tracks signup cohorts, user funnels, and revenue metrics. Key features include enhanced attribution for shared credentials and the ability to analyze monthly active users over a trailing 30-day period. Additionally, new database migrations ensure accurate revenue tracking and historical data integrity during deployments.

items.title: Refresh Featured Models for Enhanced Visibility in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update promotes GPT-5.6 Luna, Terra, and Sol, along with Gemini 3.5 Flash, in the public model directory. Additionally, GPT Image 2 and Kling v3 Omni are now featured, while GPT-5.5 has been retired from the Featured list. The changes ensure that the catalog reflects the latest and most relevant models for users.

items.title: New Memory Preference Toggle for Chat Settings in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a memory settings switch that allows users to enable or disable long-term memory in chats. The feature is backed by an account-level preference and ensures that existing memories are preserved even when disabled. Additionally, conflicts with ScheduledTasks have been resolved, and various linting issues have been addressed.

items.title: Enhance Pricing Conditions Display in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces significant improvements to the pricing conditions display for Seedance and Midjourney. It adds explicit columns for reference video options and consolidates surcharge conditions to eliminate redundancy. Additionally, the new utility for JsonLogic condition extraction enhances maintainability and testing across all supported locales.

items.title: Enhance conversation revisions with CAS support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces monotonic conversation revisions and compare-and-swap (CAS) writes across various operations, including sync, async, and CRUD paths. A rollout flag is set to false by default to maintain legacy functionality until a coordinated maintenance window is executed. Additionally, it implements typed 409 conflict responses and includes extensive tests to ensure stability and performance.

items.title: Enhance Aichat2 Memory Management in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces persistent memory preferences for users, allowing them to opt-out of memory features across chat prompts and tools. Key changes include enforcing account preferences, preserving settings during memory clearance, and implementing atomic write operations to prevent race conditions. Additionally, the latest Prettier fixes have been applied to ensure a clean linting process.

items.title: Enhance Browser Execution States in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces read-only chat rendering for durable BrowserDevice execution states, enhancing user experience without requiring cloud approval controls. Key features include strict state normalization, early-event buffering, and a dedicated activity card. The implementation has passed a comprehensive test suite, ensuring stability across various builds and locales.

items.title: Add Reference Video Uploader for Omni Editing in Nexior 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces a Reference Video uploader in the Kling config panel, enabling users to utilize the `kling-video-o1` Omni video editing feature effectively. The new component allows for the upload of MP4/MOV files, enhancing the editing capabilities by automatically managing prompt tokens and ensuring a seamless user experience. Additionally, internationalization support has been added for 18 locales.

items.title: Add omni-flash video pricing to Gemini service page in Backend 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces the omni-flash pricing rule to the Gemini service display-pricing file, ensuring that the video generation and editing price is visible on the pricing page. Previously, users could not see the pricing for the omni-flash model, which is now aligned with the existing billing rules. This change enhances user transparency regarding video service costs.

items.title: Enhance phone confirmation handling in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update teaches the shared login classifier to recognize phone confirmation as a 'logging_in' state, improving the accuracy of account-selection matching. It also prevents the standalone watchdog and quick-login callers from clicking during phone confirmation, ensuring a smoother user experience. Comprehensive tests confirm that the changes are effective and do not introduce regressions.

items.title: Introducing BrowserDevice and Session Management in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a foundational `BrowserDevice` identity and introduces browser session connection/auth modes, which are initially disabled by default. Key features include owner-scoped device management with idempotent soft revoke, enhanced token handling for browser sessions, and a new Browser Relay readiness contract. The changes ensure a robust and secure integration for browser-based connections.

items.title: Enhance Browser Session Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces improved handling for active browser sessions within the aichat2 framework, ensuring they are excluded from various processes such as token lookups and skill loading. Key files have been modified to implement these changes, and new tests have been added to validate the functionality. The changes maintain existing behaviors for OAuth and other connection types, paving the way for future enhancements.

items.title: Introduce Memory Toggle for Aichat2 Requests in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new `memory_enabled` flag to Aichat2 requests, allowing users to control memory features. When set to false, memory prompt injection, memory tools, and background learning are disabled, enhancing user control over memory usage. The change is backward-compatible and has been validated with successful tests.

items.title: Enhance Error Localization in Nexior 🗣️
items.summary: This update localizes the error messages for scheduled tasks, ensuring that all 13 distinct failure codes are now properly translated across 18 supported locales. Key changes include the addition of localized messages for the `billing_gate_failed` error and improvements to the rendering of error messages in the task cards. This enhances user experience by providing clear and understandable error notifications in their native languages.

items.title: Upgrade AuthFrontend for Better Control Sizing in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update upgrades AuthFrontend from `@acedatacloud/core` version 0.16 to 0.18, allowing Element Plus to manage control sizing effectively. The change aligns button sizes with Studio's native 32px defaults, eliminating the need for local workarounds. Validation checks confirm the successful implementation of this upgrade.

items.title: Enhance Mountsea Concurrency Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of upstream concurrency limits in Mountsea by detecting saturation through HTTP 429 and nested 'too_many_requests' responses. It maps these errors to the existing BusyError(500) contract, ensuring smoother failover routing and providing clearer public messages instead of generic object representations. Additionally, it includes tests to validate the new error mapping functionality.

items.title: Enhance Console Scroll Behavior in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the console's scroll behavior by ensuring that the root scroll area no longer expands unnecessarily. Key changes include the addition of paint containment for the desktop layout, which prevents the document root from scrolling independently of the console. This fix enhances the user experience by maintaining a clean and consistent interface across different screen sizes.

items.title: Streamline Application Responses for Efficiency in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a compact service projection for the application list endpoint, significantly reducing response sizes. The new projection decreases uncompressed data from over 3.8MB to approximately 362KB, and gzip sizes from around 657KB to about 44KB. Regression tests have been added to ensure both the compact and full detail contracts remain intact.

items.title: Restored Admin Invoice Icon in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update adds the `faFileInvoice` icon to the centralized icon library and restores its display next to the admin Invoices navigation item. The changes ensure that the icon is properly registered and available for use, enhancing the user interface for admin functionalities.

items.title: Fix video storage path for omni-flash outputs in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update changes the storage path for omni-flash video outputs from the shared '/sora' folder to the dedicated '/gemini' folder. The fix involves adding a new constant for the gemini path and updating the relevant transfer function call. Existing '/sora' URLs remain functional, ensuring no disruption for past records.

items.title: Enhance API Debugging Skills in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `debug-api-case` skill designed to assist in diagnosing API requests by tracing various identifiers and logs. It establishes a comprehensive workflow for clue-to-trace and forensic reporting, enabling detailed reconstruction of user interactions and root cause analysis. Additionally, a reusable report template has been added to standardize findings and recommendations.

items.title: Enhance Model Support Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update dynamically builds the supported-model catalog from MongoDB capabilities and returns a 400 error for unsupported models. It preserves the 500 error for temporarily invalid accounts and removes the historical account truncation while ensuring safe catalog reads. Key improvements include better handling of model fallbacks and case insensitivity.

items.title: Enhance WeChat Watchdog Supervision in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new standalone watchdog supervisor for the WeChat integration, ensuring robust monitoring and automatic restarts every 15 seconds. Key changes include the addition of a PowerShell script for health checks and modifications to the startup process to prevent multiple watchdog instances. The implementation has passed extensive testing, confirming its reliability and effectiveness.

items.title: Revive aichat2 Tool Calls for GPT-5.5 in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update restores functionality for the aichat2 tool calls when using GPT-5.5 by modifying the responses shim. Key changes include converting tool calls to the Responses API format and ensuring proper handling of function call arguments. The implementation has been thoroughly tested, passing all tests and aligning with OpenAI's Responses API documentation.

items.title: Enhance Gemini CLI with Video Options in Clis 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces new features to the Gemini CLI, including a resolution option for existing commands and a new video-to-video command. Users can now specify video resolutions (720p or 1080p) and utilize the new command to transform videos with specified URLs. These enhancements improve the flexibility and usability of the CLI for video processing tasks.

items.title: Fix: preserve translated json quotes in Backend 🐛
Enhance Video Editing Documentation in Backend 🎥
items.summary: This update documents the video editing capabilities of the `/gemini/videos` API, introducing optional parameters for `video_urls` and `resolution`. The changes include refined descriptions in the OpenAPI spec and additional documentation in Chinese, ensuring clarity for users. This enhancement streamlines video editing processes without the need for a separate catalog.

items.title: Enhance Video Editing Capabilities in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces video editing features directly on the existing `/gemini/videos` route, allowing users to upload and edit videos with optional parameters for `video_urls` and `resolution`. The changes streamline the process by eliminating the need for a separate `/omni/videos` service, enhancing efficiency and user experience. Validation improvements ensure that only valid inputs are processed, further solidifying the functionality.

items.title: Align Edit Support Contacts Dialog with Element Plus Sizes in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: The Edit Support Contacts dialog has been updated to remove explicit small size attributes from various controls, ensuring consistency with the default Element Plus sizing used throughout the UI. This change enhances the visual coherence of the dialog with the rest of the application, as it now matches the native control sizes. No other logic or styling changes were made.

items.title: Expanded Semantic Icon Set in Common Frontend 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive semantic icon manifest with 189 reviewed product meanings. The new static, tree-shakeable entry point `@acedatacloud/core/icons/components` exposes all semantics while preserving existing single-icon subpaths. The release is tagged as immutable version `@acedatacloud/core@0.18.0`, ensuring compatibility and stability.

items.title: Enhance SMS Webhook Configuration in Nexior 🔧
items.summary: This update introduces a customizable SMS webhook configuration in the Auth panel, allowing site owners to set their own SMS sender endpoint. Key features include a toggle for enabling custom endpoints, updated documentation access, and a testing interface for connectivity checks. The changes enhance user control over SMS delivery while ensuring proper localization across multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance SMS Webhook Testing with Owner Validation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new endpoint for testing SMS webhooks, allowing site owners to verify their configurations before going live. Key features include authentication checks to ensure only site owners can access the endpoint, rate limiting per user, and input validation to prevent abuse. The changes enhance security and usability for the SMS delivery system in Nexior.

items.title: Enhance Auto-Recharge UI with VIP Discounts in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update addresses user feedback by ensuring the auto-recharge UI displays the correct VIP credit discount. The front end now relies on backend data to show the discounted price, eliminating any confusion regarding pricing. Key changes include updates to the auto-recharge modal and list page, along with internationalization adjustments for multiple languages.

items.title: Streamline Auto-Recharge Pricing Logic in Backend ⚡
items.summary: This update introduces a unified pricing mechanism for auto-recharge by implementing the `quote_recharge` function, which standardizes the calculation of charges and discounts. Key changes include modifications to serializers and views to ensure that the displayed price matches the actual charge, enhancing consistency and reliability. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate the functionality and ensure robustness.
